title: Genesis Grove Putt-Putt
description: An 18-hole putting round through California-inspired Gaussian splat worlds, with drag-to-aim shots, touch controls, and a running scorecard.

prompt.objective: Build an 18-hole mini-golf tour through California-inspired splat worlds.

mintAssets.brief: California-inspired golf worlds with open greens and landmark scenery.
Putter hits, cup drops, completion accents, and gentle applause.

experience: Drag to aim and release each shot on pointer or touch.
Advance through 18 holes with par, strokes, and a running scorecard.
Keep flyovers, collision, cup capture, audio feedback, and replay readable.
prompt.visualDirection: Cinematic California landscapes, mint greens, glass HUD panels, and aerial flyovers.

thumbnail.alt: Aerial view of Half Dome Opening, a lime-green putting lane through a rocky Yosemite-inspired landscape

social.title: Genesis Grove Putt-Putt
social.description: Putt through 18 California-inspired splat worlds and finish the full Genesis Grove scorecard.

image.alt: Aerial view of Half Dome Opening, a lime-green putting lane through a rocky Yosemite-inspired landscape
